verdicts.evidence: A 1076-insertion, 9-file new distress family spanning dispatch-failure keys, reconcile snapshot threading and restart-survivable latching with subtle cross-file correctness invariants fits the xhigh/opus cell, and selector confidence was 0.83.

A 426-insertion, 5-file plumbing rewrite (read-tree/update-index with all-or-nothing abort) carrying genuine data-loss and path-traversal safety invariants warrants a top cell, and selector confidence was 0.82.
